acquisition method: The MS was operated with a top-5 data-dependent acquisition strategy.
fractionation method: Extracellular vesicles were isolated using qEVsingle size Exclusion Chromatography columns.
instrument: sprayed to a Q Exactive Plus (Thermo Fisher Scientific) quadrupole-orbitrap mass spectrometer.
labeling: Overall, label-free quantification analysis of BOEC EV and BOEC conditioned media samples detected 589 proteins.
